claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Arc is the Chrome replacement I've been waiting for.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a link to the pricing page, making it impossible to access in two clicks.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible at https://arc.net/developers without requiring a login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Bring your favorite tools into your favorite browser seamlessly, with Arc Integrations.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Arc is built from the ground up to be private and secure. We don’t know what sites you visit or what you search for.
